action.prompt: Check if .superman/context/requirements.md exists. If yes, read all .superman/ files and announce: 'Superman context restored — currently at [phase], task [N/M]'. If no .superman/ context exists, remind the user to start with @superman size-classify.

hooks.description: Remind about context persistence on code changes

action.prompt: If there is an active requirement in .superman/context/size-classification.md, ensure progress is being tracked in .superman/phases/execute/progress.md.
